dose_response.reason: Same causal logic: overconfident uncertainty leads to misclassification of novel objects, causing unsafe outcomes; additional intermediate trust step does not alter the arc
dose_response.reference: Overconfident uncertainty estimates enable autonomous vehicle perception systems to misclassify novel objects as familiar, which in open-set image recognition leads to unsafe vehicle control decisions.
dose_response.generated: Overconfident miscalibrated uncertainty from density-aware evidential deep learning, through autonomous vehicle perception encountering novel objects, triggers trust in unverified model confidence, leading to misclassified obstacles causing collisions and harm.
